name: Gods Eye Online Connector
description: MCP bridge between local Gods Eye fork (brain) and Gods Eye Online web platform. Exposes local AI capabilities as MCP tools.

onlineRepoUrl.description: URL of the Gods Eye Online repository

bridgePort.description: Port for the HTTP-SSE MCP bridge (default: 18790)

autoConnect.description: Auto-connect to Gods Eye Online on gateway start

onlineRepoUrl.label: Gods Eye Online URL
onlineRepoUrl.help: Repository URL for Gods Eye Online web platform

bridgePort.label: Bridge Port
bridgePort.help: Local port for the MCP bridge server

autoConnect.label: Auto-Connect
autoConnect.help: Automatically establish connection when gateway starts
